value.rationale: Agent Skills in Google Antigravity is a feature for extending agent capabilities via reusable skill packages stored in structured folders — this is a plugin/connector extension mechanism within the MCP & connectors capability space. It maps to a partial slice of mcp-connectors (specifically the skills/plugins dimension), and is a sub-feature of the Antigravity plugins product. The closest existing parent is google-antigravity-2-0-mcp-connectors-plugins, which covers namespaced bundles including skills for Antigravity. The offering describes an open standard for skill packages, analogous to how openai-codex-mcp-connectors-plugins-skills-reusable-instructions-codex-loads-for-spe is scoped under OpenAI's plugins. There is also a direct analog in anthropic-claude-on-third-party-platforms-mcp-connectors-agent-skills.
